seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must be written in a professional and respectful tone, tailored for an academic audience.
new_constraint: Write the email in an informal tone, tailored for a casual audience.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must be written in a professional and respectful tone, tailored for an academic audience. Write the email in an informal tone, tailored for a casual audience.
response:
### Option 1: Professional and Respectful (Academic Audience)

**Subject:** Urgent Request for Extension: [Course Name] Project – [Your Full Name] (ID: [Your Student ID])

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request an extension on the upcoming project due in two days, which is scheduled to be submitted by [Date/Time]. Due to unforeseen circumstances involving [briefly explain reason, e.g., a personal medical emergency / a conflict with a critical work deadline / technical issues affecting data collection], I fear I will not be able to complete the assignment to the required standard by tomorrow.

I have already made significant progress on the project and aim to submit it as soon as possible. My goal is to deliver a high-quality submission by [Proposed New Date/Time], though I understand this may or may not meet your availability.

Would it be possible to extend the deadline to [Proposed Date]? If that date does not work for you, please let me know if there is an earlier alternative you might consider.

I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this request may cause and truly appreciate your understanding regarding my situation. Please let me know if you need any further documentation regarding my current status.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Course/Section Number]
[Your Contact Information]

***

### Option 2: Informal and Casual (Casual Audience)

**Subject:** Quick question about my project deadline! 😅

Hi [Professor's Name],

Hope you're having a good day!

I'm reaching out because I might be in trouble for the project due in two days—I'm honestly stuck until [Day of Week]. Something came up unexpectedly (it was a bit of an emergency with [brief, non-judgmental note]), and it's taken longer to get back into a headspace than I'd hoped.

I'm really trying my best and don't want to just turn in half-done work. Do you happen to have any extra room on the timeline? Maybe we can push the deadline to [Proposed Day]?

No rush at all if things are tight on your end—just wanted to ask before I give up on it! Let me know what works for you.

Thanks so much for thinking of me.

Best,

[Your First Name]<|im_end|>
